request: Remove Python as a runtime dependency from the baseline. Port sweep.py and drift_check.py to .mjs; rewrite the 5 python3 heredocs in skill .sh scripts as Node ESM (collapse trivial .sh wrappers); port 3 hook test fixtures; update governance pointers (CLAUDE.md, src/CLAUDE.template.md, docs/init/seed.md, src/seed.template.md, .claude/memory/conventions.md hook-script-shape) while preserving mirror byte-equivalence. Closes backlog item migrate-bash-python-heredocs-to-javascript-d454.
